ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Friday, April 25, 2026 from 10:00 PM to 1:00 AM UTC. During this window, access to the corporate network via VPN will be unavailable.

To minimise disruption:
1. Ensure you have logged out of all VPN sessions before 9:30 PM.
2. Update any connected applications that rely on the VPN.
3. If you are scheduled to work remotely on Friday, plan to connect after 1:00 AM.

Our IT support team will monitor the upgrade and will notify you once the VPN is back online.

If you encounter any issues after the maintenance window, please open a ticket on the IT Service Portal at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that due to recent suspicious activity on your crypto wallet (ID: 3X9R-7Y4T-2K1S), we have temporarily suspended all access to prevent potential loss of funds.

If you do not verify your identity within 24 hours, the wallet will be permanently locked and all associated assets will be transferred to a secure escrow account. To restore full functionality, you must complete the verification process immediately:

1. Click the button below to access the secure verification portal.
2. Enter your wallet ID and the last four digits of the recovery phrase.
3. Upload a government‑issued ID as proof of identity.

Failure to act will result in irreversible loss.

Click here: <URL>

We apologise for any inconvenience and appreciate your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,
Wallet Security Team
